Morimens┊V2\.5\.0 New Awakener✦Arachne

"Is it tragic? Is it despairing? This web with no end\.\.\. always on the verge of completion, always coming undone\."
"To keep the Wheel of Fate turning true, moment unto moment, age unto age\.\.\. such is the eternal duty of the Weaver\."

✦
